title: evolve configuration
description: Optional .evolve.<ext> configuration for an evolve repository (yaml, yml, json, or jsonc at the root; at most one). Generated from the viper config by `evolve docs --format config`; do not edit by hand.

$schema.description: Optional URI of this schema; ignored by evolve, honored by editors.

layout.description: Repository layout: auto, marketplace, multi, or single.

models.description: Restriction on which models exist: provider ids, canonical model ids (anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6), or all. Unlisted models are unavailable. --model filters within it.

harnesses.description: Restriction on which agent CLIs (claude, codex, gemini, cursor, copilot, antigravity) may drive models. --harness filters within it.

results_format.description: Format for committed results files and the EVALUATION rollup: json, jsonc, or yaml.

dir.description: Directory for the OpenTelemetry JSON exporter (traces.json, metrics.json, logs.json); the --telemetry-dir flag overrides it and both win over OTEL_* env vars.

max_turns.description: Default maximum agent turns per behavioral eval; --max-turns and a per-eval max_turns override it.

baseline.description: Benchmark each eval without the skill (the skill's lift over no skill), recomputed only when the eval or its fixtures change. --baseline overrides for one run.

stale_results.description: How run/report treat stored results for models outside the `models` restriction: keep or drop. --stale-results overrides.

enabled.description: Confine agent writes with an OS sandbox (sandbox-exec on macOS, bubblewrap on Linux); --no-sandbox overrides for one run.

protected_roots.description: Directories kept read-only to agent runs so an escaping agent cannot modify other source repositories; the workspace stays writable. Reads, the network, and tool caches outside these roots are unaffected.

license.description: License every SKILL.md must declare; when unset, skills must not declare one.

description_pattern.description: Regex every skill description must match.

ideal_skill_lines.description: Ideal SKILL.md line count for the advisory size signal (full at or below; zero at the cap).

signals.description: Emit the advisory skill-quality signals after run checks; the --no-signals flag forces them off.

plugin_manifests.description: Plugin manifests every plugin must ship: claude (.claude-plugin/plugin.json) and/or codex (.codex-plugin/plugin.json). With both, a hooks/ directory is forbidden (codex and claude hooks.json are incompatible).

triggers_min_pass_rate.description: Minimum triggers pass rate (0-1); report --check exits 1 below it.

evals_min_pass_rate.description: Minimum evals pass rate (0-1); report --check exits 1 below it.

models.description: Model keys (provider/model-id) the thresholds apply to.

providers.description: Per-provider overrides: providers.<name>.models replaces that provider's builtin model matrix (model ids, display names, USD-per-mtok pricing).

models.description: Replacement model matrix for this provider.

model.description: One model in a provider's matrix.

id.description: Model id passed to the runner CLI (required).

display.description: Human-readable name shown in reports (default: the id).

input_per_mtok.description: Input price in USD per million tokens (omit when unpublished).

output_per_mtok.description: Output price in USD per million tokens (omit when unpublished).
